description: JStock is open on the Portfolio Management tab. Record a partial sale of 10 shares of NVDA (NVIDIA Corp.) from the existing portfolio on Dec 15, 2024, at a price of $950.00 per share with 0 fees. After recording the transaction, create a text report at '/home/ga/Documents/tax_lot_report.txt' documenting the resulting tax lot details, including the Cost Basis, Sale Proceeds, Realized Gain, and remaining shares. The report must clearly label these values.
